Requirement: No NHS DARS restricted data used
Evidence: Only published aggregate tables used. MHSDS patient-level data not accessed.

Requirement: No GDPR Article 9 special category data at individual level
Evidence: All analysis on aggregate published statistics. No individual health records processed.

Requirement: Data not shared externally without approval
Evidence: Sprint outputs for internal demo only. No external sharing.

Requirement: Data stored in approved project environment only

Requirement: No outputs presented as real patient-level data
Evidence: All documentation states "aggregate published statistics" as source.
